title: WaiV Robotics 破茧而出，帮助无人机在海上起降
summary: With $7.5 million in funding, WaiV Robotics is working to productize its drone landing system, and find OEM partners to work with. The post WaiV Robotics emerges from stealth to help drones take off and land at sea appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：WaiV Robotics emerges from stealth to help drones take off and land at sea）

title: Tutor Intelligence 构建数据工厂在现实世界中训练机器人 AI
summary: Tutor Intelligence is running 100 Sonny semi-humanoid robots in its headquarters while sharing technology and data with its Cassie mobile manipulator. The post Tutor Intelligence builds Data Factory to train robot AI in the real world appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Tutor Intelligence builds Data Factory to train robot AI in the real world）
